review_runs.summary: Initial review reported PR had no code changes yet.
Review requested deployment-time enforcement for host/dedicated storage separation.
Review identified numeric-only bypass risk in separation guard.
Final review: no remaining critical issues; only minor suggestions.

critical_issues.title: No code changes in PR; INF-01 functionality is not implemented
critical_issues.details: Initial review observed no changed files in the PR, so INF-01 acceptance criteria were not yet satisfied.

critical_issues.title: Dedicated/host storage separation was not enforced at deployment time
critical_issues.details: Added a deterministic deployment guard and conditional module deployment to fail when storageAccountName equals functionHostStorageAccountName.

suggestions.title: Add automated validation for INF-01 acceptance criteria
suggestions.details: Add validation checks for Standard_LRS/Cool, allowSharedKeyAccess false, soft-delete retention, private container access, and host/dedicated storage distinction.

suggestions.title: Numeric-only equal-name bypass in guard logic
suggestions.details: Guard now uses `${take(storageAccountName, 23)}-` so failure is deterministic for all equal-name inputs.
